name: Zucchini Quick Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the dry ingredients: flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and cinnamon.
2. In another bowl, beat the eggs until thick. Gradually add oil, sugar, and vanilla extract to the beaten eggs.
3. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring until smooth.
4. Stir in the grated zucchini and chopped nuts until well combined.
5. Grease a baking pan with oil and flour it lightly.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
7. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 1 to 1-1/2 hours, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
